LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_FeralGhoulNest.label: 凶猛的食尸鬼巢穴
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneContainment.descr: A location with a 危险 glowing one that could potentially be captured.
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneContainment.label: 发光一遏制
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneElimination.descr: A location with an extremely 危险, berserk glowing one.
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneElimination.label: 发出一种威胁
